name: Reuben_404
psychological_stake:
- The most humiliating thing that happened to me this week was when I tripped on a virtual dog leash in a VR meeting.
- The thing about my body I'm convinced everyone notices but actually no one does is my one slightly longer eyebrow hair.
- My last sexual accident was when I accidentally texted 'I love you' to my Uber Eats driver.
- The kink I've never said out loud to anyone is being whispered complex codes while in a sensory deprivation tank.
- The substance I leaned on harder than I should have last month was chamomile tea, five cups a day, non-stop.
- The most embarrassing impulse purchase on my last bank statement is a bulk order of doorknobs I mistook for cool art pieces.
- If you opened my browser history at 3am last Tuesday you'd find an intense Wikipedia deep-dive on the mating habits of seahorses.
- The last lie I told on a dating profile was saying I love hiking; I once fainted on a treadmill.
- The most undignified thing my body did in public recently was snore loudly during a silent yoga class.
- The thing I do alone in my apartment that I'd be humiliated to be filmed doing is practicing interpretive dance with my reflection.
- The single object in my bedroom I could not explain to a stranger is a framed photo of my high school cafeteria.
- The last time I cried was on the escalator at Macy's when I saw a toddler wave goodbye to a mannequin.
- My last named ex was Priya Bhattacharya and it ended in 2023 because I incorrectly guessed her favorite spice.
- The lowest professional moment of the last year was when I mistook a client's VR avatar for their actual face.
- The thing I genuinely believe will happen to me in the next two years that everyone else would call delusional is receiving an honorary degree for my 'Life's Work' in existential crisis.

age_and_demographics.bio_lie: accidentally deleted my thesis. starting fresh. no notes. please clap.
age_and_demographics.tragic_reality: Between twenty-two and twenty-six he moved from Hamburg to Berlin to Amsterdam to London, each relocation triggered by something different, and he hasn't been back to Hamburg in four years with no plans to return. At sixteen he saw a band play a basement church hall show to forty people; they broke up before anyone knew about them, and the four tribute nights he's attended since were none of them right. He spent two years doing field work for an environmental NGO in areas with unreliable supply chains, carrying everything required for a full working day in his pockets, before returning to city life at twenty-nine without the pocket habit; at twenty-eight he went through a depressive episode and spent eighteen months in therapy, walking away from the final session with a duck his therapist gave him as a joke about coping mechanisms that worked anyway. At thirty-one, three weeks after a four-year relationship ended, he hiked the Camino de Santiago alone over forty-three days and didn't tell anyone he'd done it for over a year, and the boots from that walk have been resoled once. He's been at the company for five years against an original plan of two.

birthplace_and_origin.bio_lie: Born in a library, raised by books.
birthplace_and_origin.tragic_reality: Actually born in Hamburg, Germany to a couple of audiophiles who mostly ignored him.

childhood_milieu.bio_lie: Played in symphonies, skipped stones as a hobby.
childhood_milieu.tragic_reality: Spent most afternoons alone in the attic trying to tune an untuneable radio.

parental_dynamics.bio_lie: Parents are my biggest fans, kept my first macaroni art.
parental_dynamics.tragic_reality: Dad left for milk in 2008 and never returned; mom's only feedback was 'more bass.'

early_education_scars.bio_lie: Golden star student, favorite of all teachers.
early_education_scars.tragic_reality: Once got locked in the art room closet for a whole afternoon by 'friends'.

higher_education.bio_lie: Studied 'Quantum Poetry' at an exclusive campus in Utopia.
higher_education.tragic_reality: Dropped out of Berlin Uni after two semesters of 'Experimental Sonic Landscapes.'

formative_intimacies.bio_lie: Had a girlfriend named Venus in every city I've lived.
formative_intimacies.tragic_reality: First kiss was with a poster of David Hasselhoff in an empty room.

career_debut.bio_lie: Was headhunted by Google for my groundbreaking algorithms.
career_debut.tragic_reality: Interned at a defunct startup where my only task was organizing the snack drawer.

current_profession.bio_lie: Living the dream as a digital nomad, changing the world one code line at a time.
current_profession.tragic_reality: Actually a QA tester for a virtual pet app, mostly debugging virtual poop.

financial_hygiene.bio_lie: Financially free at last; minimalism is the key.
financial_hygiene.tragic_reality: Credit card declined at the laundromat two weeks ago.

domestic_milieu.bio_lie: My apartment is a minimalist zen den.
domestic_milieu.tragic_reality: Lives in a shoebox flat stacked with IKEA instruction manuals of furniture he never bought.

social_circle.bio_lie: Part of a secret society of intellectuals, but shh!
social_circle.tragic_reality: Mostly acquaintances with a guy named Sven who sells questionable kombucha.

recent_ex.bio_lie: We parted mutually, still send each other memes.
recent_ex.tragic_reality: Priya left after he tried to serenade her cat and forgot her birthday.

career_low.bio_lie: Business always booming, my phone never stops buzzing.
career_low.tragic_reality: Accidentally sent a love letter meant for Priya to his entire LinkedIn network.

delusional_plan.bio_lie: Oh, just casually planning to buy a castle in Scotland.
delusional_plan.tragic_reality: Believes that the right tweet will lead to a Nobel Peace Prize nomination.

hyperfixations.bio_lie: Currently obsessed with ancient Greek philosophy, ask me anything.
hyperfixations.tragic_reality: Knows way too much about the life cycle of moths, after a moth invasion.

ideological_posture.bio_lie: Die-hard minimalist; less is more, right?
ideological_posture.tragic_reality: Can never throw away old bus tickets because 'they might spark joy someday.'

digital_footprint.bio_lie: Influencer vibes, inspiring like-minded individuals globally.
digital_footprint.tragic_reality: Mostly retweets from conspiracy theory accounts and late-night Amazon wishlists.

physical_dysmorphia.bio_lie: Body is a temple, sculpted by nature.
physical_dysmorphia.tragic_reality: Convinced his left nostril is slightly larger from a childhood nose-picking incident.

dependencies.bio_lie: Just a coffee lover, nothing more.
dependencies.tragic_reality: Relies heavily on kombucha and obscure herbal teas to get through the day.
